nodes.label: Leaderboard (Ranking)
nodes.rationale: Participant ranking page with global and per-event tabs; redirects admins to workspace-select

nodes.label: Login Page
nodes.rationale: Authentication entry point for Lyfter Badge App; redirects already-authenticated users to workspace-select (admins) or profile (regular users), and supports a 'next' redirect param for deep-linking after login.

nodes.label: Privacy Policy
nodes.rationale: Static legal page documenting data collection, infra providers (MongoDB Atlas, Render, Vercel/GitHub Pages), security (bcrypt, JWT, HTTPS)

nodes.label: Profile Page
nodes.rationale: Post-login destination for regular users.

nodes.label: Redeem Badge
nodes.rationale: Handles /redeem/{event}/{token} QR links, calls API.redeem, shows success/XP/progress/share, redirects to user-events

nodes.label: Scan QR
nodes.rationale: Camera QR scanner (jsQR), joins events / redeems badges, geolocation, celebration modal with LinkedIn/Instagram share image

nodes.label: Terms and Conditions
nodes.rationale: Static legal page describing service, accounts, acceptable use, badges/prizes, IP, liability

nodes.label: User Achievements
nodes.rationale: Shows unlocked/locked achievements by rarity and XP bar; calls API.getAchievements and getXpProfile

nodes.label: User Events
nodes.rationale: Lists joined events with per-event badge progress; welcome banner after scanning to join

nodes.label: User Ranking
nodes.rationale: Leaderboard + global XP ranking tabs; calls API.getLeaderboard and getXpLeaderboard

nodes.label: Workspace Create (god_admin)
nodes.rationale: god_admin-only form to POST /workspaces/ with name/slug/plan/logo; auto-generates slug

nodes.label: Workspace Edit
nodes.rationale: Manage members/roles and invitations (email via EmailJS or code) for a workspace; role-rank gated

nodes.label: Workspace Select Page
nodes.rationale: Post-login destination for admin/superadmin/god_admin roles.

nodes.label: Workspace Admin Panel
nodes.rationale: Full workspace admin: members, invitations, logo upload, god_admin tools (creation codes, grant roles, platform user ban/delete)

nodes.label: admin-event.html
nodes.rationale: Admin panel entered after selecting/entering a workspace

nodes.label: Primer Paso
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: yellow cartoon duck in a grey hoodie taking a step forward on stepping stones, inside a circular blue-grey badge labeled 'PRIMER PASO' (First Step). Represents the first/entry-level achievement for beginning the journey.

nodes.label: Coleccionista
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: cartoon duck surrounded by many gold/silver trophies inside a circular badge labeled 'COLECCIONISTA' (Collector). Represents collecting many badges/trophies.

nodes.label: Leyenda
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: a fully golden duck wearing a crown, sitting atop piles of gold coins and bars, inside a silver coin-like medal labeled 'LEYENDA' (Legend). Represents the highest prestige/legendary tier.

nodes.label: Ojo de Halcon
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: cartoon duck looking through a magnifying glass with a sharp/intense expression, scenic landscape behind, in a circular badge labeled 'OJO DE HALCON' (Hawk Eye). Represents keen observation/attention to detail.

nodes.label: Perfeccionista
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: cartoon duck holding a magnifying glass and palette/tools carefully examining work, in a circular badge labeled 'PERFECCIONISTA' (Perfectionist). Represents meticulous, flawless completion.

nodes.label: Vertigo
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: cartoon duck surrounded by gaming controllers, handheld console and tangled cables/gadgets, in a circular badge labeled 'VERTIGO'. Represents intense, fast-paced or dizzying activity/gaming marathon.

nodes.label: Veterano
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: cartoon duck dressed in a military uniform with medals and a campaign hat, in a circular badge labeled 'VETERANO' (Veteran). Represents long-time experience/seniority.

nodes.label: Viajero
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: cartoon duck wearing a travel hat carrying a sticker-covered suitcase, in a circular badge labeled 'VIAJERO' (Traveler). Represents traveling/attending many events or locations.

nodes.label: Completista
nodes.rationale: Achievement icon: cartoon duck amid completed checklists, treasure chests and open books with a 100% ribbon, in a circular silver badge labeled 'COMPLETISTA' (Completionist). Represents completing everything 100%.

nodes.label: Anadir Imagen
nodes.rationale: UI icon: a simple image/picture placeholder glyph (mountain inside a frame) with a circular plus sign, representing an 'add image' / upload-image control in the app interface.

nodes.label: API
nodes.rationale: Desktop monitor displaying a code editor on the left with code-tag glyphs and the text 'API', and a panel of code lines on the right. Skill/topic: API development / programming interfaces.

nodes.label: Codificacion
nodes.rationale: Browser/IDE window with a red ruler sidebar and code-tag glyphs over lines of code. Skill/topic: coding / programming (codificacion = coding).

nodes.label: Computacion en la Nube
nodes.rationale: Desktop monitor showing a cloud with a downward arrow inside it. Skill/topic: cloud computing / cloud download (computacion en la nube = cloud computing).

nodes.label: Diseno
nodes.rationale: Laptop screen split into four quadrants showing text blocks, an image/landscape, typography 'Aa', and code braces, with a green approval checkmark badge. Skill/topic: design / web and UI design (diseno = design).

nodes.label: Error
nodes.rationale: Laptop screen showing a red circle with a white X mark indicating an error. Skill/topic: error / failure / debugging.

nodes.label: JavaScript
nodes.rationale: Document/file icon with a pink label band reading 'JAVA'. Skill/topic: Java / JavaScript programming language file.

nodes.label: Mundial
nodes.rationale: Blue globe with latitude/longitude grid lines overlaid by a magnifying glass. Skill/topic: global / world / web search (mundial = world/global).

nodes.label: Proteccion de Archivos
nodes.rationale: Document/file icon with a closed padlock and a pink band of asterisks (masked password). Skill/topic: file protection / security / encryption (proteccion de archivos = file protection).

nodes.label: Sitio Web
nodes.rationale: Browser window with header dots and 'WWW' text in an orange box above lines of content. Skill/topic: website / web (sitio web = website).

nodes.label: Vinculo de Retroceso
nodes.rationale: Blue circle containing a gear connected by nodes/wires radiating outward to endpoints. Skill/topic: backlink / network connections / SEO (vinculo de retroceso = backlink).
